title: Saved Accounts, Server List & Custom Login Screens
description: This patch adds several quality-of-life improvements to your login experience

title: Classic & TBC Dungeon Maps
description: The patch adds 56 maps from retail World of Warcraft, including dungeons, continents, and battlegrounds

title: Caverns, Mines & Hidden Area Maps
description: It adds extra locations not covered by the main patch: caves, mines, dungeon entrances, starting zones, and hidden areas like GM Island and Hyjal.

title: Character Creation Screen - Mists of Pandaria Style
description: This patch replaces the character creation interface with a layout inspired by World of Warcraft: Mists of Pandaria.

title: Character Creation Screen - Shadowlands Style
description: This patch completely replaces the character creation interface with a redesigned version inspired by World of Warcraft: Shadowlands.
